task_completion.description: Read the STS stack specification file
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal window is open displaying the contents of 'sts_stack_spec.txt' from the Desktop.

task_completion.description: Add and size the External Tank (ET) component
task_completion.visual_evidence: OpenVSP geometry browser shows a new body component (e.g., Fuselage, Stack, or BodyOfRevolution) added. The parameter window for this component should show a length value of 47.0.

task_completion.description: Position the External Tank using the XForm tab
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OpenVSP 'XForm' tab is selected and visible in the component window, showing translation/rotation adjustments for the ET.

task_completion.description: Add and size the Solid Rocket Booster (SRB) component
task_completion.visual_evidence: OpenVSP geometry browser shows another body component added for the SRB. The parameter window for this component should show a length value of 45.4.

task_completion.description: Ensure the configuration has TWO SRBs
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OpenVSP 3D viewport clearly displays TWO Solid Rocket Boosters flanking the main stack, OR the 'Y-Sym' (Y-Symmetry) checkbox is visibly checked in the SRB component's settings.
A 'Save As' dialog or the OpenVSP window title bar shows the filename 'sts_ascent_stack.vsp3' being saved to the '/home/ga/Documents/OpenVSP/' directory.

integrity.description: Agent used the OpenVSP GUI to build the model
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent actively clicking through OpenVSP menus, the geometry browser, and parameter windows, rather than just running a script in the terminal to generate the file.

integrity.description: The 3D viewport shows the actual integrated shuttle stack
integrity.visual_evidence: The OpenVSP 3D workspace displays a recognizable Space Shuttle Orbiter proxy model integrated with a large central tank and side boosters, not just an empty workspace or unedited default primitives.

integrity.description: The model was saved via the application
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent is seen using OpenVSP's File > Save or Save As functionality, rather than using terminal commands like 'touch' or 'cp' to spoof the output file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The External Tank (ET) must have a target length of exactly 47.0. The Solid Rocket Booster (SRB) must have a target length of exactly 45.4. The final integrated model must be saved to '/home/ga/Documents/OpenVSP/sts_ascent_stack.vsp3'.
